channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Georgia, candidates target of ‘sustained’ cyberattacks: Reports
item.description: CNN says Georgia fended off the likely overseas attack, while Microsoft says China, Russia and Iran are targeting the U.S. election process.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Two new HHS programs to help with complicated health challenges
item.description: "A lot of the efforts that we're doing across the government have a plug into the artificial intelligence world," said Andy Kilianski. The post Two new HHS programs to help with complicated health challenges first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: This viral Tim Walz content was created by Russia, U.S. intelligence confirms
item.description: Groups in Russia created and helped spread viral disinformation targeting Democratic vice presidential candidate Tim Walz, a senior U.S. intelligence official said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: .NET MAUI Open Source Toolkit Released by Syncfusion | Revolutionizing Cross-Platform Development
item.description: Syncfusion releases open source UI controls for Microsoft .NET MAUI, enabling high-performance cross-platform app development on iOS, Android, macOS, and Windows.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How Anthropic’s new ‘computer use’ ability could further AI automation
item.description: Anthropic’s Claude 3.5 Sonnet large language model has gained a new ability: operating a computer. The new ability, which the company is calling “computer use,” is currently in beta test.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Deception in democracy: Beware the most common types of election-related scams
item.description: Cybersecurity risks are ramping up as the Nov. 5 U.S. general election approaches. Social media and the internet are used to spread propaganda.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: As coal plants shut in Romania, some miners transition to green energy while others are reluctant
item.description: PETRILA, Romania (AP) — For many years, Sebastian Tirinticǎ worked in a coal mine, just like his father and grandfather before him.
item.dc:creator: ANCA GURZU, Cipher News, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: The clever tech powering a wave of pig-butchering scams
item.description: Pig-butchering scams are all over social media platforms and are becoming more sophisticated by the day; here's how to spot the latest tricks so you don't become the next victim.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Rise of AI: OpenAI Hires Chief Economist to Tackle Economic Impacts - A Game-Changer for Job Creation?
item.description: OpenAI hires chief economist Aaron Chatterji to examine economic impacts of artificial intelligence, aiming to ensure benefits are widely distributed and inform transition to an AI-driven economy.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: How the Army makes software a front and center focus
item.description: "One of the things that we really change as part of the software implementation is, no longer is the Army going to retest everything," said Jennifer Swanson. The post How the Army makes software a front and center focus first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Meta’s new AI model can check other models’ work
item.description: Facebook owner Meta said on Friday it was releasing a batch of new AI models from its research division, including a “Self-Taught Evaluator” that may offer a path toward less human involvement in the AI development process.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: FTC's rule banning fake online reviews goes into effect
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal rule banning fake online reviews is now in effect. The Federal Trade Commission issued the rule in August banning the sale or purchase of online reviews.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Researchers say Arkansas may have 19M tons of lithium critical for battery power
item.description: Researchers said in a recent article that Arkansas may have 19 million tons of lithium, which is used in rechargeable batteries for important products like phones and electric cars.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: GoFundMe bets social media can unlock Gen Z giving. A Meta partnership and new tools will test that
item.description: New GoFundMe tools will make it easier to circulate causes across online platforms in a push to cater toward younger generations.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Biden administration to provide $325 million for new Michigan semiconductor factory
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Biden administration said Monday that it would provide up to $325 million to Hemlock Semiconductor for a new factory, a move that could help give Democrats a political edge in the swing state of Michigan ahead of election day.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Slack researcher discusses the fear, loathing and excitement surrounding AI in the workplace
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Artificial intelligence's recent rise to the forefront of business has left most office workers wondering how often they should use the technology and whether a computer will eventually replace them.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Van Halen's unreleased music
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alabama man arrested in SEC social media account hack that led the price of bitcoin to spike
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — An Alabama man was arrested Thursday for his alleged role in the January hack of a U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission social media account that led the price of bitcoin to spike, the Justice Department said. Eric Council Jr.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Hit the lights: Mets outfit Citi Field for electric light shows
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Mets are lighting up Citi Field, even before their batters step up to the plate. About 70 front-office staffers scattered around the ballpark for over five hours to install 3,500 strips of LED lights on each railing ahead of New York's first home postseason game.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
